experiment_design.shared_pool: M_all from Phase 0 DECLARE spec (fixed; same as P1 and DRVA)
experiment_design.null_protocol: Double-null: σ_label (permute class labels) ∘ σ_trace (shuffle activities within each trace). Under the double-null, every rejection is a false positive.
experiment_design.FST_gate: F(c) >= τ_F*=0.000259. τ_F* = F(c_(k)), k=K_P1_REJECTIONS=248. No statistical test. No FDR correction.
experiment_design.why_FDR_uncontrolled: Under the double-null, F_null(c) ~ chi2(1)/n_app (approximately). For fixed τ_F* > 0, some constraints exceed the threshold purely by chance. No Adaptive Storey π̂₀ correction and no doubly-null calibration of the null distribution per constraint: FDR_emp = E[V_b]/R_obs is uncontrolled.
experiment_design.null_rep_budget: Zero internal permutation iterations per replicate. FST is deterministic: holds_null → F_null^(b)(c) → V_b.
